description: Task instructions are typed out on the screen for the participant to read, detailing the domestic flight booking scenario.
frame_description: A black screen with white text being typed out line by line.

description: Further instructions regarding the 'think aloud' protocol and task completion criteria are displayed.
frame_description: A black screen with white text providing instructions on thinking aloud.

description: Instructions to open the website and the 'Open' button appear on the screen.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button to initiate the usability test on the Flight Centre website.

frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Open' button as it is clicked.

description: The browser opens a new tab and navigates to the Flight Centre Australia homepage.

description: The main promotional banner for the 'UK & EUROPE SALE' loads at the top of the page.

description: Additional promotional content, including a 'QANTAS FLIGHTS SALE' billboard, loads further down the page.

frame_description: The page content populates further, showing a Qantas sale banner below the main search widget.

description: A calendar modal for selecting travel dates appears on the screen.

description: An advertisement for 'World360' loyalty program appears as an overlay on top of the calendar modal.

frame_description: A red and white advertisement for 'World360' loyalty program covers the calendar modal.

description: The user clicks the close button (X) to dismiss the advertisement overlay.

description: The advertisement overlay disappears, revealing the travel dates calendar again.

description: The user hovers the cursor over various dates in the February 2026 calendar.

description: The user selects Wednesday, February 18, 2026, as the departure date.

description: The user hovers the cursor over the 'Done' button in the calendar modal.

description: The calendar modal closes, and the selected dates are populated in the search widget on the homepage.

frame_description: The calendar modal is closing, returning focus to the homepage search widget.

frame_description: The cursor is over the 'From' field which contains 'Sydney, Australia'.

description: A dropdown menu with popular destinations appears below the 'To' location field.

description: The user hovers the cursor over the 'Melbourne, Australia' option in the destination dropdown list.

description: The user selects 'Melbourne, Australia' from the destination dropdown.

frame_description: The 'Melbourne, Australia' option is selected.

description: The flight search results for Sydney to Melbourne are fully rendered on the page.

description: User clicks on the price button for the Qantas flight QF401 to view fare details.

description: The 'Select Departing Fare Type' section expands below the selected flight, showing 'Red Edeal' and 'Economy Flex' options.

frame_description: Two fare cards (Red Edeal and Economy Flex) appear under the selected flight row.

frame_description: Cursor is positioned over the SELECT button on the left fare card.

description: The selection is confirmed with a loading state followed by a green checkmark and a 'Good choice!' message.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The SELECT button changes to a green checkmark and a confirmation message appears.

description: A loading overlay appears with a spinner and text indicating the transition to return flight selection.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: White screen with a blue loading spinner and 'It's time to choose your flight for your return journey...' text.

description: The page location changes to the inbound results section.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The URL in the browser address bar updates to include the #inbound fragment.

description: The return flight options from Melbourne to Sydney are displayed on the page.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: List of return flights from Melbourne to Sydney is rendered on screen.

description: User scrolls down the list of return flight options to view more choices.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises

description: User hovers over the first Virgin Australia flight option while reviewing the flight times and price.

frame_description: The cursor is hovering over the first flight result card for Virgin Australia.

description: User clicks on the flight card to expand it and view fare options.

frame_description: The user clicks the flight card, triggering a UI expansion.

description: The flight card expands to reveal the 'Select Returning Fare Type' section with Lite, Choice, and Flex options.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The UI updates to show three fare columns below the selected flight.

description: User reviews the inclusions and prices for the different fare types, moving the cursor between the Lite and Choice columns.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The user is reading the fare conditions for the expanded flight option.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button for the Lite fare option.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The user clicks the blue 'SELECT' button under the $157 Lite fare.

description: The application processes the selection and navigates to the 'Review trip' page.
frame_description: The page transitions from the flight results to the review screen.

description: The 'SELECT' button shows a loading spinner while the selection is being processed.
frame_description: A loading animation is visible on the button the user just clicked.

description: A transition overlay appears with the text 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...'
frame_description: A full-screen loading/transition message is displayed to the user.

description: The 'Review trip' page content renders, showing the summary of departing and returning flights.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The review page is now fully visible, showing flight details and a price summary.

description: User hovers over the price summary on the right side of the page to verify the total cost.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the price breakdown on the right sidebar.

description: User clicks the 'CHANGE' button for the departing flight to view more details or options.

frame_description: The 'Review trip' page is displayed with flight details and price summary.

description: The departing flight details section expands to show specific flight times and aircraft information.

description: User scrolls down the review page to see the baggage information and add-ons.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The user scrolls down to view the lower sections of the review page.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT SEATS' button in the Seats add-on section.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the blue 'SELECT SEATS' button.

description: A 'Loading seat selector' overlay appears, followed by the rendering of the seat map for the first flight (SYD to MEL).
frame_description: A loading spinner is visible, then the seat map for the aircraft appears.

description: User hovers the cursor over seat 4D while considering seat options.
frame_description: The seat map is visible with various seats available for selection.

description: User hovers the cursor over seat 5E.
frame_description: The cursor moves across the seat map.

description: User hovers over seat 5C before deciding to select it.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over seat 5C.

description: User clicks on seat 5C to select it.
frame_description: Seat 5C is clicked.

description: A 'Preferred Seat' modal appears, informing the user of the cost for selecting seat 5C.
frame_description: A modal window titled 'Preferred Seat' is now visible over the seat map.

description: User clicks the 'CONFIRM SEAT' button within the modal.
frame_description: The cursor is over the blue 'CONFIRM SEAT' button in the modal.

description: The modal closes and seat 5C is now highlighted in green on the seat map, indicating it has been selected.
frame_description: The seat map is visible again with seat 5C selected.

description: User hovers the cursor over seat 8F in the seat map, likely considering it as an option.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Baggage
frame_description: The cursor pauses over seat 8F on the interactive seat map.

description: User clicks the 'DONE' button to confirm their seat selection for the current flight segment.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Baggage
frame_description: The cursor is over the 'DONE' button at the bottom right of the seat selection area.

description: The seat selection area enters a loading state with the message 'Loading seat selector' as the system processes the selection.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Baggage
frame_description: The seat map is replaced by a loading message 'Loading seat selector'.

description: The seat selector view for the first flight closes and the UI returns to the review trip page, showing the updated seat selection status.
frame_description: The page returns to the 'Review trip' view.

description: User scrolls down the page to review the booking summary, baggage details, and optional add-ons like the Captain's Pack.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Baggage
frame_description: The user scrolls through the baggage and seat selection summary page.

description: User clicks the green 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom of the page to proceed to the next step of the booking flow.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Baggage
frame_description: The user has scrolled to the bottom of the page where the green 'CONTINUE' button is located.

description: A full-screen loading overlay appears with a spinner and the message 'Thanks for confirming your flights. Next up, your traveller details...'.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Baggage
frame_description: A full-screen loading overlay with a spinner and text 'Thanks for confirming your flights' is shown.

description: The application navigates from the baggage and seats selection page to the traveller details entry page.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia - Travellers
frame_description: The screen transitions from the loading overlay to the new Travellers page.

description: Skeleton loaders appear in the traveller details section while the form content is being loaded.

description: The traveller details form for 'Adult 1' is rendered and becomes interactive.

description: The price summary on the right side of the page updates to show the detailed breakdown of costs and the final total amount.
